extraction.one_line_summary: KÄMNA Lennard won from a 15-rider breakaway, soloing to victory at Megève Altiport after dropping DE LA CRUZ David in the final kilometers.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ Primož crashed at km 82 yet finished in lead group, suggesting crash timing pre-finale allows GC salvage on uphill finish.
LANDA Mikel attacked late but lacked finish power; initiating tempo without final acceleration reveals incomplete form rather than strength.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked for podium placing after DE LA CRUZ faded, indicating recovery acceleration tests trump conservation in non-GC stages.
INEOS collapsed entirely: BERNAL DNS, THOMAS dropped, FROOME lost 26:30, SIVAKOV failed, KWIATKOWSKI dropped—total team breakdown signals systemic issue.

rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: first WorldTour win from 15-rider break, dropped DE LA CRUZ in finale showing breakaway finishing power
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: crashed at km 82, lost skin and clothing, yet finished with GC group showing exceptional resilience
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: dislocated shoulder in crash on Col de Plan de Baix, DNS Tour implications for team leadership depth
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: negative: crashed out on Col de Plan de Baix while third overall, significant Tour preparation disruption
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: DNS due to back problems after suffering previous days, suggests structural issues not acute fatigue
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: dropped early while sweating profusely, indicating form deficit not tactical patience
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: dropped early, lost 26:30, confirms continued lack of competitive form despite preparation objective
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: attacked late to set tempo, shed riders, but lacked legs to finish, revealing incomplete peak form
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: attacked at finish trying to crack ROGLIČ, moved to second GC, showing aggressive intent despite failed distancing
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: much stronger than previous day, attacked for third place finish as form test showing upward trajectory
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: positive: moved to third GC at 24 seconds showing consistency in attritional mountain stage
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: neutral: led breakaway nearly to finish, took KOM jersey but almost stopped near line showing energy management failure
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: finished 1:43 down as under-23 world champion showing transition to senior mountain racing
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: failed to produce for INEOS on day of team collapse indicating shared form deficit
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: negative: dropped and couldn't rescue INEOS day showing domestique depth problem when leaders fail
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: in trouble early on stage suggesting altitude racing form not present
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: dropped early confirming inability to match climber pace in grand tour preparation
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: abandoned after 50km choosing training ride over competition, indicates selection mismatch for terrain
